S.FORM: == pila' == 錢 ana si kpzyux pila' nya'. ungat ana qutux qu gnalu' nya' squliq ga, ungat zywaw nya'. - .
S.PHON: == pilaʔ == * ana s~ɕi kpzjux pilaʔ njaʔ. uŋat ana qutux qu ɣnaluʔ njaʔ s~ɕquliq ɣa, uŋat zjwaw njaʔ. - .
S.FORM: == pila' == 錢 ana si kpzyux pila' nya'. ungat ana qutux qu gnalu' nya' squliq ga, ungat zywaw nya'. - .
S.PHON: == pilaʔ == * ana s~ɕi kpzjux pilaʔ njaʔ. uŋat ana qutux qu ɣnaluʔ njaʔ s~ɕquliq ɣa, uŋat zjwaw njaʔ. - .
